title: Real Nicknames
description: A mod that makes changing your Display Name incredibly easy!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62e923f9aa2eccd7d8743647104a5eeda04175f2.png)
# Real Nicknames
Want to change your nickname in game? This mod allows you to do that, and change the color.
## Commands:
- `/nick clear` : Clears your nickname
- `/nick set NAME` : Changes your nickname
- `/nick color -1` : Clears your name color _(Only on 1.21.1/1.21.4)_
- `/nick color HEXCODE` : Changes your name color _(Only on 1.21.1/1.21.4)_


**If you want to color your name on 1.21.1 or 1.21.4, you will have to enable it in the config file! It is defaulted to be `off`.**

Same with the max character limit, however on other versions it is a gamerule!


  ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f7801162cc33e06486f7070223814e0c2224d2.png)
